question: Identify the root cause of the network fault: which device, what changed, and why it breaks.
description:
R6 removes the area-level `authentication message-digest` from
Area 0 while keeping the interface-level `message-digest-key`. R2
(R6's Area 0 neighbor) still requires area-level MD5 authentication
on the link. The two sides disagree on whether authentication is
expected; OSPF authentication failures fire on R2 and the
R2↔R6 adjacency drops out of Full.
expected_rca:
Root cause: on 100.64.0.106 (R6), the area-level `authentication message-digest` was removed from OSPF area 0 (the interface-level message-digest-key remains), while R2 still requires area-level MD5 on the link.
The two ends disagree on whether authentication is expected, so OSPF cannot authenticate packets on the link and the R2<->R6 area-0 adjacency cannot stay up, halting route exchange across that link.
Fix: restore `authentication message-digest` under area 0 on R6.
expected_symptoms_summary:
OSPF adjacency state change (%ROUTING-OSPF-5-ADJCHG):
- R2: neighbor 192.0.2.6 on GigabitEthernet0/0/0/1 (area 0) FULL → DOWN reason "dead timer expired".
- R6: neighbor 192.0.2.2 on GigabitEthernet0/0/0/0 (area 0) FULL → DOWN reason "dead timer expired".
- Bilateral: both ends (R2, R6) report the transition.

BGP session state change (%ROUTING-BGP-5-ADJCHANGE):
- R4: neighbor 192.0.2.5.
- R5: neighbor 192.0.2.4.

%ROUTING-BGP-5-NSR_STATE_CHANGE reported by R5 (1 instance):
- R5: Changed state to Not NSR-Ready

apply.commands:
configure terminal
router ospf 100
area 0
no authentication message-digest

revert.commands:
configure terminal
router ospf 100
area 0
authentication message-digest

expected_symptoms: RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 13:48:39.243 UTC: ospf[1035]: %ROUTING-OSPF-5-ADJCHG : Process 100, Nbr 192.0.2.6 on GigabitEthernet0/0/0/1 in area 0 from FULL to DOWN, Neighbor Down: dead timer expired, vrf default vrfid 0x60000000

RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 13:48:41.051 UTC: ospf[1035]: %ROUTING-OSPF-5-ADJCHG : Process 100, Nbr 192.0.2.2 on GigabitEthernet0/0/0/0 in area 0 from FULL to DOWN, Neighbor Down: dead timer expired, vrf default vrfid 0x60000000
RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 13:48:28.141 UTC: bgp[1084]: %ROUTING-BGP-5-ADJCHANGE : neighbor 192.0.2.5 Up (VRF: default) (AS: 65002)
RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 13:48:28.144 UTC: bgp[1084]: %ROUTING-BGP-5-ADJCHANGE : neighbor 192.0.2.4 Up (VRF: default) (AS: 65000)
RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 13:48:28.147 UTC: bgp[1084]: %ROUTING-BGP-5-NSR_STATE_CHANGE : Changed state to Not NSR-Ready
